infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: MassIQ reads your health data to track body composition and fitness metrics.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: MassIQ writes workout and nutrition data to Apple Health.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MassIQ uses the camera for body scans and meal photo logging.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MassIQ accesses your photos for body scans and meal logging.
